name: radian-marketplace
description: End-to-end GTM Claude Code plugins for Radian Capital portfolio companies. Lead gen, nurture, conversion, retention, expansion — covering the full funnel + strategic fundamentals + sales ops. Install once, get updates centrally.

plugins.name: radian-business-fundamentals
plugins.description: Strategic layer above the funnel — positioning, ICP/market selection, product strategy, narrative, pricing, GTM org design, growth model. Advisory shape, sold to CEOs.

plugins.name: radian-marketing-ops
plugins.description: Cross-channel marketing ops — lead scoring, routing, attribution, real-time enrichment, behavioral triggers, cold-lead re-engagement, lead gen + nurture reporting.

plugins.name: radian-outbound
plugins.description: Outbound motion — list building, personalization, multi-channel cadence, deliverability, reply intent detection.

plugins.name: radian-sdr
plugins.description: Inbound SDR — lead enrichment, personalized outreach, triage, meeting follow-up.

plugins.name: radian-sales-execution
plugins.description: Mid-funnel execution — SDR/AE handoff, pre-call prep, on-request enrichment, discovery + objection coaching, multi-threading, post-call + long-term followup, AE/CS handoff.

plugins.name: radian-deal-desk
plugins.description: Deal desk — approval checks, contract structuring, rep coaching on payment/billing/discount levers, deal strategy validation.

plugins.name: radian-crm-hygiene
plugins.description: CRM hygiene plumbing — activity capture, stage accuracy, dedupe, enrichment backlog, account hierarchy. The backbone everything else depends on.

plugins.name: radian-customer-success
plugins.description: CS operations — kickoff, time-to-value, activation, status visibility, feature adoption, scope management, churn risk, health score calibration, fulfillment reporting.

plugins.name: radian-revops-cro
plugins.description: CRO / RevOps view — daily Gong summaries, forecast validation, churn signals, pipeline health.

plugins.name: radian-expansion
plugins.description: Existing-customer growth — renewal management, upsell, cross-sell, references, case studies, referrals, champion job-change play, expansion reporting.

plugins.name: radian-signals-ci-geo
plugins.description: AI-native plays — signal-based GTM engine, competitive intelligence, GEO (AI search optimization), content strategy + distribution + pipeline conversion.

plugins.name: radian-sales-ops
plugins.description: Sales ops meta-layer — forecasting, territory design, quota setting, comp design, sales reporting, sales→product/marketing feedback, win/loss, ABS, qualification adherence, coaching at scale, call review.
